title: Clean PVP

body:
# Clean PvP Mod Review

Now you can support the offical github code [here!](https://github.com/Mohan-codeer/clean-pvp-minecraft-official) 

![Image of HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c082e53ba5789487068a06354ee24f5c210c9d.png)

If you are looking for a way to make your game look way **better** while you fight, you should definitely check out Clean PvP. It is a mod that gives you a super clean HUD that doesn't get in the way of your gameplay, but still tells you everything you need to know.
The Best Parts

The coolest thing about this mod is how much you can change stuff. You can actually drag and drop every part of the HUD to wherever you want on your screen. If you don't like where the FPS is, just move it!

You can also change the **colors** to match your style. It has:

- **RGB Rainbow** (my favorite)

- **Solid colors**

- **Simple outlines** if you want it to stay **"clean"**

What it Shows

It has **all** the important stuff for PvP players:

- **FPS & CPS**: Track your frames and how fast you are clicking.

- **Keystrokes**: Shows exactly what keys you are pressing on your screen.

- **Armor Status**: You can see your durability so your boots don't break in the middle of a fight.

- **Potion Effects**: No more checking your inventory to see how much Strength time you have left.

# (My) Verdict

Overall, I **feel** like this mod is great because it’s simple but has everything you need. It doesnt lag your game and it looks really slick. If you play a lot of **Bedwars** or **Skywars**, you should definitely download this on Modrinth. It makes the game feel much more professional!
